text:
/ci1 2 くっ、これがエフィメラの力……
なんて暴力的なの……

/ci1 2 シーナ！　ここまで来て
弱気になってんじゃねェぞ！
相手の動きをよく見ろ！！

/ci1 2 So this is the power of Ephemera... It's
terrifyingly brutal...

/ci1 2 Seana! We've come this far without
losing heart! Take a look at all your
companions have done!

くっ、これがエフィメラの力……
なんて暴力的なの……

シーナ！　ここまで来て
弱気になってんじゃねェぞ！
相手の動きをよく見ろ！！

So this is the power of Ephemera... It's
terrifyingly brutal...

Seana! We've come this far without
losing heart! Take a look at all your
companions have done!
